segments.text: You see rosemary oil in huge letters on
the front. But flip the bottle and
majority is useless mineral oil. That's
not marketing. That's manipulation. And
honestly, we are sick of it. I bought
parachute rosemary oil because it has
rosemary and it was cheap. Then I read
the back. Maximum mineral oil. Just 25%
is vegetable oil. And out of that also
just a pinch of rosemary they brag
about. So we are basically paying for a
lie. But then I found Brilliier. They
did something dangerous. They printed
the truth on the front. No mineral oil.
All ingredients which are good for you.
But that honesty come with a price. The
price tag. They are expensive. You will
hesitate. Why pay 800 when the parachute
one is 200 rupees? Cuz the 200 one is a
delusion. Paying for the cheap fillers.
Here you pay for the truth and you're
not being tricked. If you can afford it,
take it. But if not, that's okay. But at
least they are not lying to our faces.
Finally, a brand that respects you. For
more product insights, subscribe.
